releaseNotes:
Search
Bookings

Live search in the top toolbar (left of action buttons)
Filters as you type across guest name, phone, rooms, dates, booking #, and more
Searches all sections: unassigned, inquiries, current/upcoming, past, cancelled, and recently deleted
Auto-expands collapsed sections when they contain matches
Contacts

Same live search in the toolbar (left of All / Contacts only / Staff only)
Matches name, email, phone, family members, notes, and type
Also filters deleted contacts and expands that section when needed
Meal plan — kitchen duty
Optional Cook per meal (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, etc.) — never required
When adding a recipe (drag-and-drop or from the recipe page), pick the meal and optionally enter who is cooking on the same row
Cook appears inline on the meal row in the plan (e.g. Breakfast · 8 adults · Cook: Maria)
Cook can still be edited inline on the plan after assignment
+ Cook assigns kitchen duty without adding a recipe
Cook is shown on the Weekly and Daily views under each meal
Fixes
Meal plan drag-and-drop — recipes can be dragged onto a day again (browser compatibility fix)
Contacts page build — fixed an error caused by client components importing server-only modules
